<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Melvin Jose | Senior Audit Executive – UAE</title>
<meta name="description" content="Melvin Jose is a Senior Audit Executive based in Ajman, UAE, specialising in Corporate Tax, VAT, FTA Compliance, and Statutory Audit for UAE businesses."/>
<!-- Open Graph -->
<meta property="og:title" content="Melvin Jose | Senior Audit Executive – UAE"/>
<meta property="og:description" content="Tax & Audit Specialist helping UAE businesses with Corporate Tax, VAT, FTA Compliance and Statutory Audit. Based in Ajman, UAE."/>
<meta property="og:type" content="website"/>
<meta property="og:image" content="https://via.placeholder.com/1200x630/0b1628/c9a84c?text=Melvin+Jose+%7C+Senior+Audit+Executive"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,600;0,700;1,600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #0b1628;
    --navy-deep: #070f1c;
    --navy-mid: #112040;
    --navy-card: #0f1e38;
    --navy-border: #1e3358;
    --gold: #c9a84c;
    --gold-bright: #e8c96a;
    --gold-muted: #8a6e2e;
    --gold-pale: rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
    --white: #f8f4ec;
    --grey: #8a9bb5;
    --light-grey: #c8d4e8;
    --green: #2ecc71;
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { background: var(--navy-deep); color: var(--white); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.7; overflow-x: hidden; }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 1.1rem 5rem; background: rgba(7,15,28,0.96); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border); }
  .nav-logo { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.35rem; letter-spacing: 4px; color: var(--white); }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; align-items: center; }
  .nav-links a { color: var(--grey); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.3s; position: relative; padding-bottom: 4px; }
  .nav-links a::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 1px; background: var(--gold); transition: width 0.3s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }
  .nav-cv { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); color: var(--navy-deep) !important; padding: 0.45rem 1.2rem; font-weight: 700 !important; letter-spacing: 1.5px !important; transition: all 0.3s !important; }
  .nav-cv:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-bright)); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .nav-cv::after { display: none !important; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero { width: 100%; min-height: 100vh; position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(--navy-deep); }
  .hero-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(160deg, var(--navy-deep) 0%, var(--navy-mid) 55%, #0b1e3d 100%); z-index: 0; }
  .hero-bg::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; width: 48%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.07) 0%, rgba(201,168,76,0.02) 100%); clip-path: polygon(18% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); }
  .hero-bg::after { content: 'AUDIT'; position: absolute; right: -3rem; bottom: 8%; font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 22rem; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.04); letter-spacing: 1.5rem; pointer-events: none; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; }
  .hero-accent-bar { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), var(--gold-bright), var(--gold), transparent); z-index: 2; }
  .hero-banner { position: relative; z-index: 2; width: 100%; padding: 0 5rem 3rem; flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; padding-top: 7rem; }
  .hero-banner-inner { width: 100%; max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr; align-items: center; gap: 5rem; }

  .hero-eyebrow { font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 1.6rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; }
  .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ''; display: inline-block; width: 45px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); }
  .hero-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(4rem, 7vw, 6.5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.0; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; color: var(--white); letter-spacing: -1px; }
  .hero-name span { color: var(--gold); }
  .hero-title { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--light-grey); font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .hero-company { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
  .hero-tagline { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--light-grey); margin-bottom: 2.5rem; padding-left: 1.2rem; border-left: 2px solid var(--gold); line-height: 1.5; }
  .hero-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.6rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
  .hero-tag { padding: 0.4rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.05); font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--grey); transition: all 0.3s; }
  .hero-tag:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); background: var(--gold-pale); }
  .hero-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.85rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); color: var(--navy-deep); padding: 0.9rem 1.8rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.73rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-bright)); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); color: var(--grey); padding: 0.9rem 1.8rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.73rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
  .btn-wa { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; background: rgba(37,211,102,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(37,211,102,0.3); color: #25d366; padding: 0.9rem 1.8rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.73rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .btn-wa:hover { background: rgba(37,211,102,0.2); border-color: #25d366; }

  /* avatar */
  .hero-visual { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; }
  .avatar-wrap { position: relative; }
  .avatar-ring { width: 300px; height: 300px; border-radius: 50%; background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold-bright), var(--gold-muted), var(--gold-bright), var(--gold-muted)); padding: 3px; }
  .avatar-inner { width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-card), var(--navy-mid)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; }
  .avatar-photo { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; }
  .avatar-initials { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 5.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -2px; }
  .avatar-badge { position: absolute; bottom: 8px; right: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); color: var(--navy-deep); width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; border: 3px solid var(--navy-deep); }
  .hero-stats { display: flex; border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); background: rgba(11,22,40,0.85); width: 100%; max-width: 320px; }
  .stat-item { flex: 1; padding: 1rem 0.5rem; text-align: center; border-right: 1px solid var(--navy-border); }
  .stat-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .stat-num { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.9rem; color: var(--gold); line-height: 1; }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--grey); margin-top: 0.25rem; }

  /* hero badge bar */
  .hero-badge-bar { position: relative; z-index: 2; width: 100%; padding: 1.25rem 5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.6rem; }
  .hero-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.85rem; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); color: var(--grey); font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 1px; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; }
  .hero-badge-link { text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s; cursor: pointer; }
  .hero-badge-link:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.18); border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
  .hero-badge-wa { background: rgba(37,211,102,0.08); border-color: rgba(37,211,102,0.2); color: #25d366; }
  .hero-badge-wa:hover { background: rgba(37,211,102,0.18) !important; border-color: #25d366 !important; color: #25d366 !important; }

  /* ── STATS STRIP ── */
  #stats { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-mid), var(--navy-card)); border-top: 1px solid var(--navy-border); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border); padding: 0; }
  .stats-strip { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
  .stats-block { padding: 3rem 2rem; text-align: center; border-right: 1px solid var(--navy-border); position: relative; transition: background 0.3s; }
  .stats-block:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .stats-block:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.05); }
  .stats-big { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 3.5rem; color: var(--gold); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 2px; }
  .stats-sub { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--grey); margin-top: 0.4rem; }
  .stats-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--light-grey); margin-top: 0.5rem; line-height: 1.5; }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section { padding: 7rem 5rem; }
  .section-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-header { margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .section-label { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .section-label::before { content: ''; display: inline-block; width: 30px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--white); }
  .section-title span { color: var(--gold); }
  .gold-divider { width: 55px; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); margin: 1.5rem 0; }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  #about { background: var(--navy); }
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: start; }
  .about-text p { color: var(--light-grey); font-size: 0.93rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; line-height: 1.85; }
  .about-text p strong { color: var(--white); font-weight: 600; }
  .focus-list { list-style: none; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .focus-list li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.8rem; color: var(--light-grey); font-size: 0.88rem; padding: 0.65rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border); }
  .focus-list li::before { content: '▸'; color: var(--gold); flex-shrink: 0; }
  .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }
  .service-card { background: var(--navy-card); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); border-top: 2px solid var(--gold-muted); padding: 1.5rem; transition: transform 0.3s, border-top-color 0.3s; }
  .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-top-color: var(--gold); }
  .service-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .service-card h4 { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .service-card p { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--grey); line-height: 1.65; }
  /* industry tags */
  .industries-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.6rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .industry-tag { padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; background: var(--gold-pale); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25); color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; }

  /* ── EXPERIENCE ── */
  #experience { background: var(--navy-deep); }
  .timeline { position: relative; }
  .timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--gold) 0%, var(--navy-border) 30%); }
  .timeline-item { padding-left: 2.5rem; padding-bottom: 3.5rem; position: relative; }
  .timeline-item:last-child { padding-bottom: 0; }
  .timeline-dot { position: absolute; left: -5px; top: 0.4rem; width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); border: 2px solid var(--navy-deep); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(201,168,76,0.45); }
  .timeline-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; }
  .timeline-role { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); }
  .timeline-badge { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); color: var(--navy-deep); font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.3rem 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .timeline-company { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .timeline-meta { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--grey); letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .timeline-bullets { list-style: none; }
  .timeline-bullets li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.8rem; color: var(--light-grey); font-size: 0.87rem; padding: 0.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); line-height: 1.65; }
  .timeline-bullets li::before { content: '—'; color: var(--gold); flex-shrink: 0; font-weight: 700; }
  .timeline-skills-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .skill-pill { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25); color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.65rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; }

  /* ── SKILLS ── */
  #skills { background: var(--navy); }
  .skills-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3.5rem; }
  .skills-group h3 { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; }
  .skill-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0.75rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border); }
  .skill-name { font-size: 0.86rem; color: var(--light-grey); }
  .skill-bar-wrap { width: 120px; height: 2px; background: var(--navy-border); }
  .skill-bar { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); }
  .tools-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.7rem; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .tool-tag { background: var(--navy-card); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); color: var(--grey); font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; letter-spacing: 1px; transition: all 0.3s; cursor: default; }
  .tool-tag:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold-bright); }
  .cert-card { background: var(--navy-card); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); padding: 1.3rem 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; transition: transform 0.3s; }
  .cert-card:hover { transform: translateX(4px); }
  .cert-card h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--white); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .cert-card p { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--grey); }

  /* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
  #testimonials { background: var(--navy-deep); }
  .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .testimonial-card { background: var(--navy-card); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); padding: 2rem; position: relative; transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; }
  .testimonial-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.35); }
  .testimonial-card::before { content: '\201C'; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 5rem; color: var(--gold); line-height: 0.8; position: absolute; top: 1.2rem; left: 1.5rem; opacity: 0.4; }
  .testimonial-text { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--light-grey); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; font-style: italic; }
  .testimonial-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.85rem; }
  .author-avatar { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold-pale); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .author-name { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--white); font-weight: 600; }
  .author-title { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--grey); }
  .testimonial-stars { color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; letter-spacing: 2px; }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  #contact { background: var(--navy); }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: start; }
  .contact-intro { font-size: 0.93rem; color: var(--light-grey); line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .contact-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; }
  .contact-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.2rem; padding: 1.15rem 1.5rem; background: var(--navy-card); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s; }
  .contact-item:hover { border-color: var(--gold); transform: translateX(5px); }
  .contact-icon { width: 42px; height: 42px; background: var(--gold-pale); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--gold); flex-shrink: 0; font-weight: 700; }
  .contact-icon.wa { background: rgba(37,211,102,0.1); border-color: rgba(37,211,102,0.3); color: #25d366; }
  .contact-icon.li { background: rgba(10,102,194,0.15); border-color: rgba(10,102,194,0.4); color: #0a66c2; }
  .contact-label { font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--grey); margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .contact-value { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--white); }
  .contact-cta-box { background: var(--navy-card); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); padding: 2.5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .contact-cta-box::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold-bright), var(--gold-muted)); }
  .contact-cta-box h3 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.7rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.9rem; color: var(--white); }
  .contact-cta-box p { color: var(--grey); font-size: 0.86rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; line-height: 1.75; }
  .cta-list { list-style: none; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .cta-list li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.75rem; color: var(--light-grey); font-size: 0.84rem; padding: 0.4rem 0; }
  .cta-list li::before { content: '✓'; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .cta-buttons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; }
  .cta-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); color: var(--navy-deep); padding: 1rem 2rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .cta-btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-bright)); }
  .cta-btn-wa { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; background: rgba(37,211,102,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(37,211,102,0.3); color: #25d366; padding: 1rem 2rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .cta-btn-wa:hover { background: rgba(37,211,102,0.2); }

  /* CV download banner */
  .cv-banner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-mid), var(--navy-card)); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); padding: 1.5rem 2rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4rem; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; }
  .cv-banner-text h4 { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--white); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .cv-banner-text p { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--grey); }
  .cv-download-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-muted), var(--gold)); color: var(--navy-deep); padding: 0.75rem 1.75rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.3s; white-space: nowrap; }
  .cv-download-btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-bright)); transform: translateY(-1px); }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer { background: var(--navy-deep); border-top: 1px solid var(--navy-border); padding: 2rem 5rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; }
  .footer-logo { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.2rem; letter-spacing: 4px; color: var(--white); }
  .footer-logo span { color: var(--gold); }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; }
  .footer-links a { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--grey); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 1px; transition: color 0.3s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .footer-copy { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--grey); }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .hero-eyebrow { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both 0.10s; }
  .hero-name    { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both 0.22s; }
  .hero-title   { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both 0.30s; }
  .hero-company { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both 0.36s; }
  .hero-tagline { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both 0.42s; }
  .hero-tags    { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both 0.50s; }
  .hero-actions { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both 0.60s; }
  .hero-visual  { animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease both 0.35s; }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 960px) {
    nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 5rem 1.5rem; }
    #stats { padding: 0; }
    .hero-banner { padding: 6rem 1.5rem 2rem; }
    .hero-banner-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-visual { display: none; }
    .hero-bottom-bar { padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; }
    .bottom-bar-item { border-right: none; padding: 0.35rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.65rem; }
    .stats-strip { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .stats-block { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--navy-border); }
    .about-grid, .skills-layout, .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; }
    .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .cv-banner { flex-direction: column; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
    .footer-links { justify-content: center; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">MJ<span>.</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">

<!-- HERO -->

  <div class="hero-accent-bar"></div>
  <div class="hero-banner">

      <!-- TEXT -->
      <div class="hero-text">
        <div class="hero-eyebrow">Senior Audit Executive · Ajman, UAE</div>
        <h1 class="hero-name">Melvin<br><span>Jose</span></h1>
        <p class="hero-title">Tax & Audit Specialist</p>
        <p class="hero-company">Live Auditors & Chartered Accountants LLC</p>
        <p class="hero-tagline">Clarity in Compliance.<br>Confidence in Growth.</p>
        <div class="hero-tags">
          <span class="hero-tag">Corporate Tax</span>
          <span class="hero-tag">VAT</span>
          <span class="hero-tag">E-Invoicing</span>
          <span class="hero-tag">FTA Compliance</span>
          <span class="hero-tag">Statutory Audit</span>
        </div>

          <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">Get In Touch →</a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/melvin-jose-" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost">LinkedIn ↗</a>

        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- AVATAR -->
      <div class="hero-visual">
        <div class="avatar-wrap">
          <div class="avatar-ring">
            <div class="avatar-inner">
              <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="avatar-photo" alt="Melvin Jose"/>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="avatar-badge">✓</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stats">
          <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">5+</div><div class="stat-label">Years Exp.</div></div>
          <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">100+</div><div class="stat-label">CT Reports</div></div>
          <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">UAE</div><div class="stat-label">Based</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- STATS STRIP -->
<section id="stats">
  <div class="stats-strip">
    <div class="stats-block">
      <div class="stats-big">100+</div>
      <div class="stats-sub">CT Reports Filed</div>
      <div class="stats-desc">End-to-end Corporate Tax reports for Free Zone & mainland clients</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-block">
      <div class="stats-big">5+</div>
      <div class="stats-sub">Years Experience</div>
      <div class="stats-desc">Audit, tax, and compliance across UAE & India</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-block">
      <div class="stats-big">9+</div>
      <div class="stats-sub">Industries Served</div>
      <div class="stats-desc">Trading, construction, manufacturing, restaurants & more</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-block">
      <div class="stats-big">UAE</div>
      <div class="stats-sub">Based & Active</div>
      <div class="stats-desc">Corporate Tax, VAT, and e-invoicing compliance specialist</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-label">Who I Am</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">About <span>Me</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-text">
        <p>I'm <strong>Melvin Jose</strong>, an Audit Professional based in the UAE, with a strong focus on <strong>financial accuracy, regulatory compliance, and structured business processes</strong>.</p>
        <p>My core expertise lies in helping businesses stay aligned with evolving UAE regulations — while ensuring their financial systems are clean, reliable, and audit-ready.</p>
        <p>Alongside my audit role, I've recently started exploring <strong>digital marketing and content strategy</strong>, taking consistent steps to understand how professional services can be positioned more effectively in today's digital landscape.</p>
        <div class="gold-divider"></div>
        <p style="font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:0.75rem;">What I'm Focused On</p>
        <ul class="focus-list">
          <li>Strengthening expertise in audit and UAE compliance</li>
          <li>Deeper exposure to UAE regulatory frameworks (CT, VAT, FTA)</li>
          <li>Consistency in financial review and reporting processes</li>
          <li>Developing skills in digital marketing and content creation</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p style="font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">What I Do</p>
        <div class="services-grid">
          <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">📋</div><h4>Audit & Assurance</h4><p>Financial reviews, verification processes, and audit readiness for UAE businesses.</p></div>
          <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">🏛</div><h4>UAE Compliance</h4><p>Corporate Tax, VAT, and FTA regulatory support with a detail-oriented approach.</p></div>
          <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">📊</div><h4>Accounting Review</h4><p>Financial data verification, bookkeeping review, and internal controls documentation.</p></div>
          <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">📣</div><h4>Digital Marketing</h4><p>Content creation and campaign execution to improve professional service visibility.</p></div>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;margin-top:2rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Industries Served</p>
        <div class="industries-row">
          <span class="industry-tag">Trading</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Construction</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Manufacturing</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Restaurants</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Labour Supply</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Event Management</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Professional Services</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Schools</span>
          <span class="industry-tag">Logistics</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience">

    <div class="timeline">

      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
        <div class="timeline-header">
          <div>
            <div class="timeline-role">Senior Audit Executive</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">Live Auditors & CA's | Ajman, UAE</div>

          </div>
          <span class="timeline-badge">Current Role</span>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-skills-row">
          <span class="skill-pill">FTA Compliance</span>
          <span class="skill-pill">Corporate Tax</span>
          <span class="skill-pill">VAT Advisory</span>
          <span class="skill-pill">Audit Leadership</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
        <div class="timeline-header">
          <div>
            <div class="timeline-role">Audit Executive</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">Live Auditors & CA's | Ajman, UAE</div>
            <div class="timeline-meta">JAN 2024 – DEC 2025 · 2 YEARS · FULL-TIME · ON-SITE</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <ul class="timeline-bullets">
          <li>Spearheaded 100+ end-to-end Corporate Tax report preparations for Free Zone and mainland clients, including CT return filing, QFZP assessments, and Small Business Relief (SBR) evaluations.</li>
          <li>Led VAT advisory and Tax Group registration support for multi-entity clients, with successful coordination across FTA portal issues, member alignment, and compliance documentation.</li>
          <li>Drafted custom Transfer Pricing (TP) and CT reports, integrating industry-specific legal provisions, transitional relief claims, and valuation insights aligned with UAE CT law.</li>
          <li>Represented clients in FTA correspondences, penalty waiver requests, and post-registration corrections — resulting in successful resolution of multiple high-stakes cases.</li>
          <li>Collaborated with internal audit teams to develop tailored audit checklists and risk assessments for schools, trading, logistics, and service sector clients.</li>
          <li>Supported operational reporting, marketing strategy, and internal templates — contributing to enhanced client onboarding and proposal quality.</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="timeline-skills-row">
          <span class="skill-pill">FTA Compliance</span>
          <span class="skill-pill">VAT</span>
          <span class="skill-pill">Transfer Pricing</span>
          <span class="skill-pill">Risk Assessment</span>
          <span class="skill-pill">Audit Checklists</span>
        </div>

      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
        <div class="timeline-header">

          <span class="skill-pill">Tax Preparation</span>

      </div>

        <div style="background:var(--navy-mid);border:1px dashed var(--navy-border);padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--grey);line-height:1.7;">

<!-- TESTIMONIALS -->
<section id="testimonials">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-label">What People Say</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Client <span>Testimonials</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="testimonials-grid">
      <div class="testimonial-card">
        <div class="testimonial-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testimonial-text">Melvin's knowledge of UAE Corporate Tax law is exceptional. He guided us through our first CT return with precision and ensured we were fully compliant with FTA requirements from day one.</p>
        <div class="testimonial-author">
          <div class="author-avatar">AM</div>
          <div>
            <div class="author-name">Ahmed M.</div>
            <div class="author-title">CFO, Trading Company · Dubai, UAE</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="testimonial-card">
        <div class="testimonial-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="testimonial-text">We had a complex VAT penalty situation and Melvin handled our FTA correspondence brilliantly. His structured approach and attention to detail got the penalty waived successfully.</p>
        <div class="testimonial-author">
          <div class="author-avatar">SR</div>
          <div>
            <div class="author-name">Sarah R.</div>
            <div class="author-title">Director, Professional Services Firm · Ajman, UAE</div>
          </div>

      </div>
      <div class="testimonial-card">
        <div class="testimonial-stars">★★★★★</div>

        <div class="testimonial-author">
          <div class="author-avatar">KP</div>
          <div>
            <div class="author-name">K. Pillai</div>
            <div class="author-title">Finance Manager, Logistics Co. · Sharjah, UAE</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-label">Get In Touch</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Let's <span>Connect</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div>
        <p class="contact-intro">If you're looking for a professional who can support your audit and compliance requirements, bring structure and accuracy to your financial processes, and is continuously evolving — let's talk.</p>
        <div class="contact-items">
          <a href="mailto:inquiries.melvinjose@gmail.com" class="contact-item">

            <div><div class="contact-label">LinkedIn</div><div class="contact-value">linkedin.com/in/melvin-jose-</div></div>

            <div class="contact-icon">📍</div>

          </div>
        </div>

      <div class="contact-cta-box">
        <h3>Ready to Work Together?</h3>
        <p>Whether you need audit support, tax compliance guidance, or strategic financial advice — I'm here to help your business stay compliant and grow with confidence.</p>
        <ul class="cta-list">
          <li>Audit & compliance support for UAE businesses</li>

          <li>FTA correspondence & penalty resolution</li>

</section>
